# CapabilityNegotiation.MayInvokeSampling method

A server MUST NOT invoke `sampling/createMessage` unless `sampling` is present (R-6.2-l). Mirrors TS `mayInvokeSampling`.

```csharp
public static bool MayInvokeSampling(JsonObject clientCaps)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| clientCaps | The client's declared capabilities. |

## Return Value

`true` when sampling may be invoked.
